_comment: Job specs as they actually arrive from a delivery lead — messy bullets, not tidy capability dicts. 'raw' is what lands in the inbox. 'parsed_stub' is a deterministic stand-in for the LLM parser that will read real messy specs in production (the LLM slots in here; the rest of the pipeline is deterministic). domain_family drives the mismatch check.

- familiar with agile delivery lifecycle
